title: Understand: the water cycle
description: Check your understanding of the water cycle in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.
topic_path: Middle school Earth and space science - NGSS

The diagram below shows part of the water cycle. Letters A through D represent processes that take place during the cycle.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Which letter represents transpiration?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

options.alt: Letter A shows arrows pointing from a body of water to the atmosphere. Letter B shows an arrow pointing from trees to the atmosphere. Letter C shows a cloud forming in the atmosphere. Letter D shows an arrow in the rain, pointing down from a rain cloud.
